articles.note: API key needed to publish programmatically. Can also publish at dev.to/dashboard

devto.action_needed: Dev.to API key to publish article #4 programmatically. Or publish manually at https://dev.to/dashboard

setup_instructions: 4. Fill in name and redirect URI (http://localhost)
5. Save and copy client_id and client_secret
6. Set env vars: REDDIT_CLIENT_ID, REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET, REDDIT_USERNAME, REDDIT_PASSWORD
reddit.posting_strategy: Post 1 per day, start with r/programming on Sat, then r/javascript Sun, r/webdev Mon

hackernews.issue: Need karma to post Show HN (usually 5+ required)
hackernews.action_needed: Comment on 5-10 discussions to build karma before submitting Show HN
